WATCHER-CALM_STANCE.title: Calm
WATCHER-CALM_STANCE.description: When you exit this Stance, gain [blue]2[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
WATCHER-CALM_STANCE.smartDescription: When you exit this Stance, gain [blue]2[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
WATCHER-WRATH_STANCE.title: Wrath
WATCHER-WRATH_STANCE.description: Deal double damage. Take double damage.
WATCHER-WRATH_STANCE.smartDescription: Deal double damage. Take double damage.
WATCHER-DIVINITY_STANCE.title: Divinity
WATCHER-DIVINITY_STANCE.description: Deal triple damage. Gain [blue]3[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Exit this Stance at the start of your next turn.
WATCHER-DIVINITY_STANCE.smartDescription: Deal triple damage. Gain [blue]3[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Exit this Stance at the start of your next turn.
WATCHER-MARK_POWER.title: Mark
WATCHER-MARK_POWER.description: Whenever you play [blue]Pressure Points[/blue], lose [blue]X[/blue] HP.
WATCHER-MARK_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play [blue]Pressure Points[/blue], lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
WATCHER-MANTRA_POWER.title: Mantra

WATCHER-COLLECT_POWER.title: Collect
WATCHER-COLLECT_POWER.description: At the start of your next [blue]X[/blue] turns, put a [blue]Miracle+[/blue] into your hand.
WATCHER-COLLECT_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, put a [blue]Miracle+[/blue] into your hand.
WATCHER-FASTING_POWER.title: Fasting
WATCHER-FASTING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]X[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Energy.
WATCHER-FASTING_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Energy.
WATCHER-FORESIGHT_POWER.title: Foresight

WATCHER-FORESIGHT_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, [blue]Scry[/blue] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
WATCHER-LIKE_WATER_POWER.title: Like Water
WATCHER-LIKE_WATER_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if you are [blue]Calm[/blue], gain [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Block[/blue]

WATCHER-DEVA_POWER.title: Deva
WATCHER-DEVA_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} X times and increase this gain by Y.

WATCHER-PLATED_ARMOR_POWER.title: Plated Armor
